options.name: -input_threshold_pct
options.description: specifies the slew input threshold value

options.name: -input_threshold_pct_fall
options.description: specifies the slew input fall threshold value

options.name: -input_threshold_pct_rise
options.description: specifies the slew input rise threshold value

options.name: -output_threshold_pct
options.description: specifies the slew output threshold value

options.name: -output_threshold_pct_fall
options.description: specifies the slew output fall threshold value

options.name: -output_threshold_pct_rise
options.description: specifies the slew output rise threshold value

options.name: -slew_lower_threshold_pct
options.description: specifies the slew lower threshold value

options.name: -slew_lower_threshold_pct_fall
options.description: <pctValue> specifies the slew lower fall threshold value

options.name: -slew_lower_threshold_pct_rise
options.description: <pctValue> specifies the slew lower rise threshold value

options.name: -slew_upper_threshold_pct
options.description: specifies the slew upper threshold value

options.name: -slew_upper_threshold_pct_fall
options.description: <pctValue> specifies the slew upper fall threshold value

options.name: -slew_upper_threshold_pct_rise
options.description: <pctValue> specifies the slew upper rise threshold value
